title: coleus ruandensis
intro: Coleus ruandensis, also known as Kikokiko, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family, native to East Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coleus ruandensis include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
